title: Focal's Backpack
description: Add Backpack in your Minecraft world
body:
[![Download RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f3364896232817aba911b513a447c3c9f2a9e9.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/focal-resourcepack/version/NjyzBlDM) --- Hello! I'm Focal. I added Backpack in Minecraft. # About this pack
- **Crafting** 1. **First, You need craft a Advanced Crafting Table.** ![Advanced Crafting Table Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82c1ef71a85dfd677edb09bfdbcf3fdfe616222.png) 2. **Then watch recipes in the advancements pages.** > You will get recipes when you get chest ![Backpack Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e2a2f160368b383439bae293c0e2d2971b683e8.gif) > If you want dye your backpack, here is recipe ![Dyeing Backpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14d39af5fa55530ba979f4f693cc96917d85be4a.gif) ## How to Use Backpack When right click with the backpack in your main hand, it will toggle between your inventory and the backpack.
The backpack's description will show the remaining space.
I know I'm making this too complicated, but you can download it and try it out for yourself.
--- **If you want to see me create more content, supporting my work gives me the energy to make more stuff.**
> [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a368690a65792758810fc081de33e5fa9c5a04.png)](https://ko-fi.com/focalsalt)
> [![Support me on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150ad87ca2fc99b8e1ebb73e00d2ac1c9a6d0c83.png)](https://patreon.com/focalsalt) --- Any BUG or Suggest, welcome to my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sErWHY8PXH) to report.
Hope you like it, enjoy :D
